metadata.description: Maps each deduplicated threat to its discovering Phase B specialists for confidence analysis

ECON-H001.title: SurplusGuildMinter getRewards() Checks Slashed Flag Against Uninitialized Memory, Enabling Permissionless Theft of All Staked CREDIT
ECON-H001.duplicate_group_description: SurplusGuildMinter.getRewards() checks slashed flag against uninitialized memory variable (default zero) before loading actual userStake from storage, causing all stakers on any term with historical gauge loss to be incorrectly slashed

ECON-H002.title: Stale canOffboard Flag Allows Immediate Re-Offboarding After Re-Onboarding, Permanently Pausing PSM Redemptions
ECON-H002.duplicate_group_description: LendingTermOffboarding canOffboard flag persists across re-onboarding, enabling permissionless re-offboarding without new poll, double-incrementing nOffboardingsInProgress counter and permanently pausing PSM redemptions

ECON-H004.title: GuildVetoGovernor Deterministic ProposalId Prevents Repeated Veto Attempts on Same Timelock Action
ECON-H004.duplicate_group_description: GuildVetoGovernor.createVeto() generates deterministic proposalId from timelockId; OZ Governor prevents duplicate proposals, so a failed veto permanently blocks future veto attempts on the same timelock action

TECH-H004.title: LendingTerm._partialRepay minBorrow Check Uses Inconsistent Units After creditMultiplier Decrease
TECH-H004.duplicate_group_description: LendingTerm._partialRepay compares stored nominal borrowAmount against dynamically-scaled minBorrow() (inversely proportional to creditMultiplier), blocking partial repayments after creditMultiplier decreases

TECH-H005.title: ERC20Gauges._decrementWeightUntilFree Infinite Loop When User Has Zero-Weight Gauge
TECH-H005.duplicate_group_description: ERC20Gauges._decrementWeightUntilFree has loop counter incremented only inside if(userGaugeWeight != 0) block, causing infinite loop when user has zero-weight gauge in set (addable via incrementGauge(gauge, 0))

TECH-H006.title: ProfitManager.notifyPnL Reverts on Large Loss Due to Underflow in creditMultiplier Calculation
TECH-H006.duplicate_group_description: ProfitManager.notifyPnL underflows when computing creditMultiplier update if loss exceeds creditTotalSupply after surplus buffer depletion, permanently bricking auction settlement and locking collateral

OPS-H006.title: Debt Ceiling Check in _decrementGaugeWeight Prevents Slashing of GUILD Voters on Fully-Utilized Terms
OPS-H006.duplicate_group_description: GuildToken._decrementGaugeWeight requires issuance <= debtCeilingAfterDecrement, blocking gauge weight removal, token transfers, and critically applyGaugeLoss (slashing) when a term is fully utilized

TECH-H008.title: ProfitManager Guild Profit Permanently Stuck When Gauge Weight Is Zero
TECH-H008.duplicate_group_description: ProfitManager.notifyPnL skips gaugeProfitIndex update when gauge weight is zero, but amountForGuild CREDIT is already deducted from total, permanently locking those tokens in ProfitManager

ECON-H013.title: Perpetual Yield Delay via Micro-Distributions in Rebase Distributor
ECON-H013.duplicate_group_description: ERC20RebaseDistributor.distribute() resets the 30-day interpolation period for ALL pending rewards on every call, enabling griefing via small distributions that perpetually delay reward materialization

TECH-H011.title: ERC20RebaseDistributor updateTotalRebasingShares Can Overflow uint224 Trapping Last Rebasers
TECH-H011.duplicate_group_description: ERC20RebaseDistributor.updateTotalRebasingShares can overflow uint224 when rebasing shares decrease dramatically, trapping remaining rebasing users via safeCastTo224 revert

TECH-H012.title: PSM decimalCorrection may underflow / revert for peg tokens with >18 decimals, blocking PSM deployment or bricking mint/redeem paths
TECH-H012.duplicate_group_description: SimplePSM decimalCorrection calculation underflows for peg tokens with decimals > 18, bricking PSM deployment or mint/redeem operations

TECH-H013.title: Loan ID generation uses timestamp-only entropy causing same-second self-DoS and potential cross-user collision scenarios under account abstraction batching
TECH-H013.duplicate_group_description: Deterministic loanId generation via keccak256(borrower, term, timestamp) prevents multiple borrows per second and permanently consumes IDs after loan closure

ECON2-H012.title: AuctionHouse.forgive Forces Total Loss on Valuable Collateral When Auction Expires Without Bids
ECON2-H012.duplicate_group_description: AuctionHouse.bid() reverts when creditAsked becomes 0 at exact auction end boundary, forcing total-loss forgive() path even when collateral has value

ECON-H007.title: ProfitSharingConfig Precision Loss from uint32 Truncation Causes Systematic Profit Misdistribution
ECON-H007.duplicate_group_description: ProfitManager.setProfitSharingConfig stores splits as uint32 after dividing by 1e9, causing truncation that systematically misdirects the residual creditSplit

OPS-H013.title: Permissionless re-initialization of LendingTerm clones allows attacker to rewrite core/refs/params and take over collateral + mint paths
OPS-H013.duplicate_group_description: LendingTerm.initialize() is permissionless with only assert-based one-time guard, allowing attacker to front-run initialization of uninitialized clones with malicious references

OPS-H017.title: Auction callback trust + lack of reentrancy guards may allow malicious collateral tokens to reenter and corrupt loan/issuance via external calls during onBid/repay paths
OPS-H017.duplicate_group_description: LendingTerm._borrow mints CREDIT before pulling collateral via safeTransferFrom, creating a reentrancy window exploitable by callback-capable collateral tokens (ERC777/malicious ERC20)

ECON2-H003.title: Division by Zero in debtCeiling Locks GUILD Tokens
ECON2-H003.duplicate_group_description: LendingTerm.debtCeiling() divides by totalWeight which becomes 0 when all gauges of a type are deprecated, causing division by zero that locks GUILD voters from unvoting

TECH-H001.title: SurplusGuildMinter.getRewards() Checks Slashed Flag Against Uninitialized Memory Variable

TECH-H002.title: LendingTermOffboarding canOffboard Persists Across Re-onboarding, Enabling Immediate Re-offboarding and PSM DoS

TECH-H003.title: GuildVetoGovernor createVeto Can Be Griefed to Permanently Block Veto of Timelock Action

TECH-H007.title: GuildToken._decrementGaugeWeight Debt Ceiling Check Blocks Gauge Voting Decrease and Token Transfers

TECH-H009.title: LendingTerm.forgive() On Loan In Active Auction Permanently Corrupts AuctionHouse State

TECH-H010.title: ERC20RebaseDistributor distribute() Griefing via Small Amounts Delays Reward Interpolation

TECH-H014.title: AuctionHouse: bid() permanently blocks settlement at exact auction end boundary, potentially forcing total-loss forgive path

TECH-H015.title: ERC20Gauges: zero-weight gauge entries can create non-terminating loop in _decrementWeightUntilFree(), DoSing transfers/burns for affected users

TECH-H016.title: SurplusGuildMinter.updateMintRatio is permissionless and can be griefed to trigger large rate-limited mints/burns against the system's mint buffers

TECH-H017.title: ProfitManager.initializeReferences is a one-time assert-based initializer; mis-ordering or partial setup can permanently brick core accounting

TECH-H018.title: GuildVetoGovernor.executeVeto may allow executing cancel without quorum if OZ Governor state transitions mark proposal as executable before custom state() indicates Succeeded

TECH-H019.title: CoreRef.emergencyAction performs arbitrary external calls without per-call target allowlisting; a compromised GOV role can sweep any approvals/ETH held by protocol contracts

ECON-H008.title: ERC20RebaseDistributor distribute() Restarts Interpolation Period, Enabling Perpetual Reward Delay Griefing

OPS-H012.title: ERC20RebaseDistributor updateTotalRebasingShares Overflow Can Trap Last Rebasing Users' Funds

OPS-H014.title: Auction settlement can be permanently blocked when ProfitManager.notifyPnL loss path reverts (loss > totalSupply), freezing collateral and issuance

OPS-H015.title: Anyone can brick a user’s GUILD transfers by adding a 0-weight gauge, triggering an infinite loop in _decrementWeightUntilFree during transfers/burns

OPS-H016.title: Deterministic loanId generation can be exploited to prevent multi-loan actions in same second and to grief integrations relying on parallel borrows

OPS-H018.title: GuildVetoGovernor updateTimelock can desynchronize veto protections, allowing queued actions to become effectively unvetoable

OPS-H019.title: CreditToken delegateBySig uses raw ecrecover without ECDSA malleability checks, potentially enabling signature replay variants in downstream tooling

OPS2-H011.title: Permissionless re-initialization of LendingTerm clones enables attacker-controlled references (creditMinter/creditToken/auctionHouse) leading to theft or permanent lock of collateral

OPS2-H012.title: Unbounded callMany loop allows on-chain DoS against loan calling/auctions by passing huge arrays and reverting mid-loop

OPS2-H013.title: Debt ceiling calculation can be forced to revert via malicious gaugeWeightDelta input causing uint256(int256) conversion failure

OPS2-H014.title: ERC20Gauges: attacker can plant 0-weight gauges causing infinite loop in _decrementWeightUntilFree, bricking token transfers/burns for that account (and any contract holding its tokens)

OPS2-H015.title: GuildVetoGovernor allows griefing by creating a deterministic veto proposal that (if it fails) cannot be retried, preventing future veto attempts on the same timelock action

OPS2-H016.title: Auction settlement can brick if ProfitManager.notifyPnL reverts on extreme loss, locking collateral/auction forever

OPS2-H017.title: Rebase share price interpolation can overflow uint224 on large share decreases, blocking exitRebase/transfer paths for remaining rebasers

OPS2-H018.title: SimplePSM can burn user CREDIT for zero pegToken output due to rounding, enabling griefing via tiny redemptions and confusing accounting during stress
